confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: Provide a prompt that the user will see to confirm the dialog being executed.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Provide slot filling metadata for the dialog inputs.

channelData.title: Channel data
channelData.description: Contains parameters specific to the channel to be handled by the client.

value.title: Value
value.description: Contains parameters specific to the activity to be handled by the client.

title.title: Title
title.description: The text to display on the button. If not specified, a default value will be shown depending on the type of quick reply.

image.title: Image
image.description: An image URL or base64-encoded image string to display next to the button text.

imageAltText.title: Image alternative text
imageAltText.description: The alternative text to display on the image.

usageDescription.title: Usage Description
usageDescription.description: Describes the purpose of the connector action

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: The list of actions that should be executed when triggered.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier for the trigger within the scope of this topic.

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: An optional condition that decides whether the topic should be triggered. Ignored when the topic is redirected to explicitly.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Set priority for this trigger against other qualifying triggers with lower numbers indicating higher priority.

runOnce.title: Run once
runOnce.description: Run this trigger only once per turn.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique ID for the action. Must be unique within the trigger.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: When disabled, an action does not execute.

conversationOutcome.title: Conversation outcome for analytics
conversationOutcome.description: Sets the outcome of the current session for the purpose of analytics. The outcome is set before the action's execution.

note.title: Notes
note.description: Sticky notes associated with the action.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the agent's capabilities and purpose.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata including authors, tags, and other arbitrary properties

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

latencyMessageSettings.title: Latency Message
latencyMessageSettings.description: In text conversations this message will be sent once. In voice conversations, this message will loop until the operation is complete.

input.title: Input
input.description: Maps variables to the inputs of this action

output.title: Output
output.description: Maps outputs of this action to variables.

errorHandling.title: Error handling
errorHandling.description: Determine what happens when an error occurs.

unrecognizedPrompt.title: Retry prompt
unrecognizedPrompt.description: Send this message again when a valid response isn't identified.

repeatCount.title: How many reprompts
repeatCount.description: The maximum number of times this message will be repeated when a valid response isn't identified.

activityProcessed.title: Activity processed
activityProcessed.description: When set to false, reprocesses the message after redirecting to the target dialog.

activityProcessed.title: Activity processed
activityProcessed.description: When set to false, reprocesses the message after redirecting to the target dialog.

intent.title: Intent
intent.description: Definition of the intent to be recognized.

allowBargeIn.title: Allow barge-in
allowBargeIn.description: Users can interrupt bot during audio play back.

randomizeVariantSelection.title: Randomize Variant Selection
randomizeVariantSelection.description: When enabled, reprompts are played in random order. When disabled, they are played sequentially.

allowBargeIn.title: Allow barge-in
allowBargeIn.description: Users can interrupt bot during audio play back.

randomizeVariantSelection.title: Randomize Variant Selection
randomizeVariantSelection.description: When enabled, reprompts are played in random order. When disabled, they are played sequentially.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text to send to the bot when clicked.

displayText.title: Displayed text
displayText.description: The text to display as a sent message in the chat history after the user has clicked.

url.title: URL
url.description: The full URL to open when clicked.

MakeCall.title: Make a call
MakeCall.description: Sends a link that starts a call.

phoneNumber.title: Phone number
phoneNumber.description: The phone number to call when clicked.

SendHiddenMessageBack.title: Send a hidden message
SendHiddenMessageBack.description: Sends a plain text message not shown in chat history.

text.title: Text
text.description: The text to send to the bot when clicked. This will not be shown in the chat history after sending.

mode.title: End user authentication
mode.description: Control which user authentication type will be used

AdaptiveDialog.title: Topic
AdaptiveDialog.description: A topic has trigger phrases and conversation nodes. Trigger phrases are phrases, keywords, and questions that a user is likely to type that are related to a specific issue. Conversation nodes define how a bot should respond to a trigger phrase and what it should do.

modelDisplayName.title: Model Display Name
modelDisplayName.description: Overrides the display name of this component when used by AI models.

modelDescription.title: Model Description
modelDescription.description: Overrides the description of this component when used by AI models.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description: A list of triggers that are evaluated when this topic is active or on the stack.

endAutomatically.title: End automatically
endAutomatically.description: Defines whether the topic should automatically exit when the end of the dialog is reached. This is enabled by default and should only be disabled when additonal triggers have been defined on this topic.

inputType.title: Inputs
inputType.description: Schema for the inputs to this dialog.

outputType.title: Outputs
outputType.description: Schema for the results of this dialog.

allowLatencyMessage.title: Send a message
allowLatencyMessage.description: If true, action will be allowed to send a latency message to the user.

latencyMessage.title: Message
latencyMessage.description: The activity to send to the user

latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.title: Delay
latencyMessageDelayInMilliseconds.description: This setting determines how long the bot will wait before delivering the latency message after a background operation request has started. Timing is set in milliseconds.

minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.title: Minimum playback time
minimumPlaybackInMilliseconds.description: The latency message will play for this amount of time, at least, even if the background operation completes while the message is playing. Timing is set in milliseconds.

InvokeFlowAction.title: Action
InvokeFlowAction.description: Invokes a Power Automate flow, possibly with inputs and outputs.

flowId.title: Flow Id
flowId.description: The unique identifier of the Cloud Flow.

errorResponseBody.title: Error response body
errorResponseBody.description: Variable of the error response body

WaitForConnectorTrigger.title: Wait for connector trigger
WaitForConnectorTrigger.description: wait for a connector's trigger to fire, possibly with inputs and outputs.

InvokeConnectorAction.title: Connector action
InvokeConnectorAction.description: Invokes a connector's operation, possibly with inputs and outputs.

HttpRequestAction.title: HTTP Request
HttpRequestAction.description: Choose a REST API to invoke/sends an HTTP request to an external endpoint.

errorHandling.title: Error handling
errorHandling.description: Determine what happens when an error occurs.

response.title: Save response as
response.description: The variable to store the result in.

responseSchema.title: Response data type
responseSchema.description: The schema of the HTTP response object.

responseHeaders.title: Response headers
responseHeaders.description: Variable to store response headers in

AdaptiveCardPrompt.title: Adaptive Card
AdaptiveCardPrompt.description: Send an adaptive card to the user and save the response in a variable. You can also use this node to validate user input and reprompt if the input doesn't meet certain criteria.

card.title: Card
card.description: The adaptive card to send to the user

output.title: Output
output.description: Maps outputs of this card to variables.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Ask a question and save the response in a variable. You can also use this node to validate user input and reprompt if the input doesn't meet certain criteria.

alwaysPrompt.title: Skip question
alwaysPrompt.description: If true, the question will be skipped if the variable already has a value.

skipQuestionMode.title: Skip question
skipQuestionMode.description: Controls when to ask the question if the variable already has a value.

variable.title: Variable
variable.description: The variable into which the response will be saved

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The activity to send to the user

invalidPrompt.title: Condition not met prompt
invalidPrompt.description: The prompt to send when the identified entity doesn't pass the validation rules.

defaultValueResponse.title: No entity found message
defaultValueResponse.description: The message to send when the maximum retry count has been reached and the default entity is used.

validation.title: Condition
validation.description: Additional criteria the entity must meet to be considered valid. Must be a formula that evaluates as true or false (e.g. 'Topic.Var1 < 10').

defaultValue.title: Action if no entity found
defaultValue.description: The value to assign the result variable when the maximum retry count has been reached and no entity has been identified.

CSATQuestion.title: CSAT Question
CSATQuestion.description: Asks the user for a rating between 1 and 5. CSAT stands for customer satisfaction score

variable.title: Save response as
variable.description: Store the response rating (1-5) in this variable.

ActionScope.title: A sequence of actions to execute. Action scopes should not be added to a topic explicitly, it is used as part of conditions and loops.

Foreach.title: Loop through a list
Foreach.description: Executes a set of actions for each item in the provided list.

value.title: Loop value variable
value.description: The variable to store the item of the loop in.

index.title: Loop index variable
index.description: The optional variable to store the zero-based index of the items in.

BreakLoop.title: End loop
BreakLoop.description: Used inside loops, such as for each item, to immediately exit the loop.

ContinueLoop.title: Skip to next item
ContinueLoop.description: Used inside loops, such as for each item, to skip to the next item.

EditTableV2.title: Modify items in a list
EditTableV2.description: Add, remove or take items from a list variable. Depending on the change type, this action can add an item to the end of the list, take an item from the beginning or the end of the list, remove an item from anywhere in the list, or clear all items from the list.

EndDialog.title: End current topic
EndDialog.description: Ends the current dialog topic and returns control to the caller.

clearTopicQueue.title: Clear topic queue
clearTopicQueue.description: Clears upcoming topics that were queued for the current activity.

EndConversation.title: End conversation
EndConversation.description: End the conversation when the user is done interacting with the bot or when the bot can't help the user any further. Channel-specific behavior applies when conversations end. For telephony, the call will hang up.

SetVariable.title: Set variable value
SetVariable.description: Sets a variable to a provided value

SetTextVariable.title: Set text variable
SetTextVariable.description: Sets a variable to a value that is translated when the bot's message content is translated.

value.title: Value
value.description: The text value to set the variable to.

ParseValue.title: Parse value
ParseValue.description: Parses a string or untyped value to the provided data type. When the input is a string, it will be treated as JSON.

errorPolicy.title: Error policy
errorPolicy.description: Policy for handling properties in the data at execution time which were not defined in the original structure.

instructions.title: Custom instructions
instructions.description: Explain how you want the orchestrator to fulfill a user's query using a set of tools

responseInstructions.title: Response instructions
responseInstructions.description: Explain how you want the agent to respond or what you want it to do when responding. For example, you can say "talk in a professional manner."

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tools available to the agent for extended functionality.

OnRedirect.title: On Redirect
OnRedirect.description: Activates only when redirected to, this topic is not triggered automatically.

description.title: Description
description.description: In a few words, say what it is and when it should be used, so your agent can use it effectively.

OnRecognizedIntent.title: On Recognized Intent
OnRecognizedIntent.description: Triggered when an intent is recognized.

OnError.title: On Error
OnError.description: Triggered when an error occurs. The ErrorCode and ErrorMessage variables are available to get more details about the error.

aIModelId.title: AI Model ID
aIModelId.description: The unique identifier of the AI Model

oneOf.title: Default behavior
oneOf.description: No special action taken when the topic starts.

oneOf.title: Cancel other topics
oneOf.description: Cancel all other topics before starting this topic.

oneOf.title: Use latest published content and cancel other topics.
oneOf.description: Cancel all other topics before starting this topic. Look for the lastest published version, and apply it to this conversation.

oneOf.title: Default
oneOf.description: Does not trigger when a question is interrupted.

oneOf.title: Trigger on topics and questions
oneOf.description: Trigger either when multiple topics are matched, or when multiple potential topics are found when a question is interrupted.

oneOf.title: Resolved (confirmed)
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached then the current session is considered resolved for the purpose of analytics. The session ends immediately for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Resolved (implied)
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached and user didn't reply then we consider that the current session is in assumed resolved for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Escalated
oneOf.description: If the dialog action is reached then the current session is considered escalated for the purpose of analytics.

oneOf.title: Global variables for the current session
Conversation history for the current session
Topic
oneOf.description: Variables from the current topic

oneOf.title: Global
oneOf.description: Global variables

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: All variables

oneOf.title: Public Network
oneOf.description: Use public addresses and internet for network communication.

oneOf.title: Virtual Network
oneOf.description: Use virtual network subnet delegated to the Power Platform.

oneOf.title: Provisioning
oneOf.description: The bot is currently provisioning

oneOf.title: Provisioned
oneOf.description: The bot is fully provisioned including BCR resources.

oneOf.title: ProvisionedWithoutRegistration
oneOf.description: The bot is provisioned but it doesn't have app and bot registration in azure.

oneOf.title: ContentReady
oneOf.description: The bot is content is ready for use. The bot is still provisioning.

oneOf.title: ProvisionFailed
oneOf.description: The bot failed to provision

oneOf.title: Lowest
oneOf.description: Lowest moderation, allowing the bot to generate many responses, though they may include inaccuracies

oneOf.title: Low
oneOf.description: Bot generates most responses, but responses can have inaccuracies

oneOf.title: Medium
oneOf.description: Bot generates more responses, but responses may be less relevant

oneOf.title: High
oneOf.description: Bot generates fewer responses, but responses are relevant

oneOf.title: Highest
oneOf.description: Highest moderation, limiting the bot's responses to ensure only the most accurate and relevant content

oneOf.title: Friendly
oneOf.description: Warm, approachable, friendly, and open

oneOf.title: Confident
oneOf.description: Efficient, competent, secure, and reliable

oneOf.title: Empathetic
oneOf.description: Understanding, compassionate, and sensitive

oneOf.title: Conversational
oneOf.description: Clear, casual, easy to understand, and familiar

oneOf.title: Professional
oneOf.description: Respectful, knowledgable, neutral, and formal

oneOf.title: Motivational
oneOf.description: Enthusiastic, cheerful, and positive

oneOf.title: Disabled
oneOf.description: Do not use any advanced indexing for SharePoint queries.

oneOf.title: EnabledWithFallback
oneOf.description: Use advanced indexing for SharePoint queries. If a user does not have access, fallback to a non-indexed query.

oneOf.title: EnabledWithoutFallback
oneOf.description: Use advanced indexing for SharePoint queries. If a user does not have access, return no results.

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: All outputs from the action definition will be included

oneOf.title: Specific
oneOf.description: User will specify which outputs should be included

oneOf.title: Based on sound (silence)
oneOf.description: Detect user has stopped speaking based on sound.

oneOf.title: Based on sentence context
oneOf.description: Detect user has stopped speaking based on meaning.

oneOf.title: Prompt for disambiguation
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, prompt the user to clarify (default behavior).

oneOf.title: Automatically select next occurrence
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, automatically pick the next matching occurrence relative to now.

oneOf.title: Automatically select previous occurrence
oneOf.description: When the recognized date/time is ambiguous, automatically pick the previous matching occurrence relative to now.

oneOf.title: Throw error
oneOf.description: Runtime data that can't be parsed into the appropiate type will raise a Runtime Error

oneOf.title: Default Blank
oneOf.description: Runtime data that can't be parsed into the appropiate type will be ignored and properties without values will be filled with null

oneOf.title: Text only
oneOf.description: Store the textual output in the target variable.

oneOf.title: Complete (recommended)
oneOf.description: Store the text output, the speech output and the citations in the response variable.

oneOf.title: is greater than or equal to
is less than or equal to
The variable can not be used in AI processing
The variable can be used in AI processing
Power virtual agents can read the secret successfully
The bot was not allowlisted to read the secret
'Power Virtual Agents Service' application doesn't have access to the Key Vault
KeyVault or secret was not found
ContentIsNull
oneOf.description: Content is null

oneOf.title: FormatIsNull
oneOf.description: Format is null

oneOf.title: DialogActionIsNull
oneOf.description: Dialog action is null

oneOf.title: SchemaIsNull
oneOf.description: SchemaName of the component to validate is null

oneOf.title: InvalidLanguageCode
oneOf.description: Invalid language code

oneOf.title: InvalidFormat
oneOf.description: Invalid format

oneOf.title: ComponentNotFound
oneOf.description: Component for validation cannot be found

oneOf.title: DialogNotFound
oneOf.description: Dialog component not found

oneOf.title: SkillNotFound
oneOf.description: Skill component not found

oneOf.title: ActionNotFound
oneOf.description: ActionId not found

oneOf.title: FlowNotFound
oneOf.description: Flow not found

oneOf.title: InvokeSkillActionNotFound
oneOf.description: Invoke skill action not found

oneOf.title: BotNotLoaded
oneOf.description: Bot was not loaded

oneOf.title: FeatureNotLoaded
oneOf.description: Features were not loaded

oneOf.title: ErrorGettingDynamicPlanToolDefinition
oneOf.description: Error getting dynamic plan tool definition

oneOf.title: TranslationsAppliedWithCurrentLanguage
oneOf.description: Translations have been applied by assigning CurrentLanguage. Changes to the content are not supported
